heading: Coordination with other Federal radiation compensation laws
label: 7385j Coordination with other Federal radiation compensation laws
text: Except in accordance with , an individual may not receive compensation or benefits under the compensation program for cancer and also receive compensation under the Radiation Exposure Compensation Act ( note) or .section 7384u of this title42 U.S.C. 2210section 1112(c) of title 38
notes: References in TextThe Radiation Exposure Compensation Act, referred to in text, is , , , which is set out as a note under .Pub. L. 101–426104 Stat. 920section 2210 of this titleOct. 15, 1990
